## Title: Add error handling to NAS ESM message container XML dump functions

### Summary
The `dump_esm_message_container_xml()` function in the NAS ESM module called `dump_octet_string_xml()` without checking its return value, risking undefined behavior if XML generation failed. The underlying `dump_octet_string_xml()` function also lacked proper error handling for `snprintf()` failures, NULL pointer inputs, and potential buffer overflows. These issues could lead to segmentation faults or corru
